【非人主角+无cp+规则怪谈+种田+势力经营+非国运+骰娘保佑】

弱小者抱团方能立足在这个规则至上的世界。
怪谈聚合体家因为内乱规则崩溃。画家正在寻找新的家人拼好家，欢迎报名。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o5564b6665b11730764d1f69ad2e0f818~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"不声不痒","author_id":"","book_id":"7600706526868687934","book_name":"规则怪谈也想经营家族","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":372,"name":"网游","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=372&name=网游&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":864,"name":"副本","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=864&name=副本&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":851,"name":"规则怪谈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=851&name=规则怪谈&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7601129963420385817","read_count":"24400","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"225883"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.7","serial_count":"107","tags":"悬疑脑洞,悬疑,网游,副本,规则怪谈","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o5564b6665b11730764d1f69ad2e0f818~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779449742&x-signature=8TqBQegSCORAssVtEydbsxi72IU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4347931069264477","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"103"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323193542DDFBD36F040234B37700"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":8775,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":544},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7616176434787222297","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"优点：
有安科（用骰子决定剧情，不过本作好像只决定一些支线（说是人物的死与活会用这个决定））属性
有较细的大纲，据作者说剧情已达到1/4处，结局相对可能明确（主角成阴天子）
非人角度，但是个人观感上感觉由于没有强调与人类的区别所以让人不太反感
缺点：
有安科属性
非人类角度，看多了最近流行的某些作品的话，看这个可能会有点转变不过来思维，甚至一起仇视
中性：
好像有一些倾向性
好像是女作者，可能有人因为某些女作者在意这点
可能有不被广泛接受的行为与剧情/一点点的恶趣味/作者有点乐子人属性
有小剧情决定投票/人物支线剧情
有（可能的）捏他（现实中其他相关作品痕迹/引用/致敬）（无尽暖暖？）","text_exts":[{"e":85,"s":82,"text":"阴天子","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%98%B4%E5%A4%A9%E5%AD%90&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177426574234B37700%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227616176434787222297%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227600706526868687934%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%98%B4%E5%A4%A9%E5%AD%90%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773284745,"group_id":"7600706526868687934","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"用户21370742","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+Lj4hlCH+pL9UOzxvEjet5Av678V6dca3ZAHoqBk7ih","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"2137074285163149","user_name":"ZHR606"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2137074285163149","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7600706526868687934","book_info":{"abstract":"评价刚出，会涨
